title: pericallis × hybrida
intro: Pericallis × hybrida, also known as the Canary Island Kalanchoe or Island Cushion, is a hybrid plant species that belongs to the family Crassulaceae. It is native to the Canary Islands and has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The plant has various health benefits, including reducing inflammation, promoting wound healing, and exhibiting antimicrobial activity. The leaves and stems of the Pericallis × hybrida plant can be used in herbal preparations, such as infusions, tinctures, and salves, to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
